---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['feature', 'enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem/Use Case
What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe your ideal solution. How would you like this feature to work?

## Alternative Solutions
Have you considered any alternative approaches? Describe them here.

## Benefits
- Who would benefit from this feature?
- How does this improve the UnifiedIntelligence system?
- What value does this add?

## Implementation Considerations
- [ ] Requires Redis schema changes
- [ ] Affects existing APIs
- [ ] Needs configuration updates
- [ ] Requires documentation updates
- [ ] May impact performance

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Clear definition of "done"
- [ ] Specific requirements
- [ ] Edge cases considered
- [ ] Testing strategy defined
EOF < /dev/null
